Off Calendar Feb-13-2003 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., 831/649-0669, appearing speciallly for plaintiff, moving to enter judgment and/or setting case for early trial
Miguel Gadda appearing in propria persona 239-0616, opposing the motion

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM RAMIREZ RAMIREZ's Mtn To Enter Judgment, Or, Alternatively, To Set Case For Early Trial -- Denied. Failure to supply proof of service pursuant to CRC 317(c). (DAG/301/JU) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
